# TravelView — Your World, Pinned.

> Put your photos on the map. See every photo where it was taken, build geo-located albums, and relive your journeys the way they actually happened.

TravelView is an iOS app that reads GPS metadata from your photo library and pins each photo to its exact location on a map. No manual entry, no syncing, no accounts — just open and explore.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://travelview_website/): Features, how it works, download
- [Privacy Policy](https://travelview_website/privacy.html)
- [Terms](https://travelview_website/terms.html)

## Features

- **Photo Map View** — Every photo with GPS metadata appears as a pin on a zoomable map. Tap to view, edit, or navigate to that location
- **Custom Albums** — Create geo-located albums for any trip, event, or place; set a location and see the whole story on the map
- **Edit Locations** — Manually add or correct GPS data by typing a place name or coordinates
- **Yearly Albums** — Automatically organized by year so you can see what happened in 2023, 2024, or any year — and where
- **Swipe Navigation** — Smooth swipe gestures with circular navigation and full-quality display
- **On-Device Privacy** — No cloud uploads, no accounts, no data leaving your phone

## How It Works

1. Grant one-time photo access on first launch
2. Photos with GPS data pin themselves automatically to the map
3. Create geo-located albums for your trips
4. Zoom in on any corner of the map to see what you captured there

## Availability

- iOS (App Store) — Free
- 100% on-device · No accounts required · Unlimited albums

© 2026 TravelView
